_publications._publicationTitle: Spectrophotometric and computational characterization of charge transfer complex of selumetinib with 2,3-dichloro-5,6-dicyano-1,4-benzoquinone and its utilization in developing an innovative green and high throughput microwell assay for analysis of bulk form and pharmaceutical formulation.

_contextSnippet: The three-dimensional HSA has been plotted as a visual aid for understanding and analyzing numerous intermolecular interactions in the complex through graphical representations
details: Successfully performed Hirshfeld surface analysis providing three-dimensional visualization of intermolecular interactions in the SEL-DDQ complex
